figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of our controlled comparison between EO-specific and generalist vision foundation models for remote sensing image retrieval. We compare models pretrained on electro-optical remote sensing imagery and natural images under the same retrieval protocol, evaluating both in-domain performance and cross-scene generalization.
Table 1. F1-score (%) comparison of self-supervised models for RS-CBIR on BEN-14K, FMoW-RGB, and FMoW-Sentinel datasets under in-domain and cross-scene evaluation settings.
